title: bolanthus hirsutus var. alpinus
intro: Bolanthus hirsutus var. alpinus, also known as the alpine woolly beardtongue, is a plant species within the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Western Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Bolanthus hirsutus var. alpinus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its herbal benefits, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
